title: send_profile_events SEGV
description:
### Describe the bug
Seen here: https://s3.amazonaws.com/clickhouse-test-reports/json.html?REF=master&sha=b7d9de3be657da4afac7d8c0408609f05fc99b2b&name_0=MasterCI&name_1=BuzzHouse+%28amd_ubsan%29 cc @kavirajk
### How to reproduce
Run:
```sql
CREATE DATABASE d0 ENGINE = Replicated('/clickhouse/path/d0', '{shard}', '{replica}');
CREATE VIEW d0.v0 AS SELECT 1 c0;
DETACH TABLE d0.v0 PERMANENTLY;
SET send_profile_events = 0;
ATTACH TABLE d0.v0 SETTINGS send_profile_events = 1;
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE d1.t1 (id INTEGER, name VARCHAR, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE VIEW d1.v1 AS SELECT id, name FROM d1.t1 WHERE id > 0;
key_bug_features: ATTACH TABLE with send_profile_events set to 1
